extraction.one_line_summary: MARICHKA Yaakov won stage 6 sprint with Bianchi-Triestina leadout, taking his fourth stage victory while maintaining orange jersey by 19 seconds over Marini.
tactical_patterns: Bianchi-Triestina leadout positioned Marichka only 5th-7th wheel at 600m but trusted late sprint timing over early positioning.
UnitedHealthcare disrupted leadout but lacked final punch, revealing team sprint organization insufficient against single powerful finisher.

rider_signals.MARICHKA Yaakov: positive: fourth stage win demonstrates dominance on flat Chinese stages, confident holding back in leadout until final 300m
rider_signals.MARINI Nicolas: neutral: second at 19 seconds GC, consistently placing but lacks stage-winning speed against Marichka
rider_signals.CARTIER: negative: crashed during stage despite earlier breakaway dominance, reliability issue under pressure
rider_signals.MUSICIAN Anton: positive: Basque Mints rider showing unexpected sprint capabilities in Asian race, moving into points contention
